title: Integration Status Object
description: Canonical MuleSoft integration status object for Salesforce persistence, processing state tracking, retries, and batch progress.

applicationName.description: Name of the application creating the record.

channelId.description: Identifier of the channel if one is used in the process.

correlationId.description: MuleSoft correlationId used to identify requests and logs across applications.

dataSource.description: System where the data in the integration originated.

dataTarget.description: System where the data in the integration was going.

message.description: Message describing the record, either a process state descriptor or the error description.

processName.description: Name of the business process used in the integration.

relatedRecordId.description: Record ID of the related record outside Salesforce, useful for troubleshooting and support.

salesforceRecordId.description: Salesforce record ID for the record used in the integration.

status.description: Status of the integration when the record was created.

type.description: Type of integration, such as REST, Event, Schedule, Platform Event, or CDC Event.

replayId.description: Replay ID or event ID used for event-based integration.

retryCount.description: Number of times the integration process has been retried.

retryDelayUnit.description: Unit of time for the retry delay.

processedCount.description: Number of records successfully processed in a batch or multi-record integration.

failedCount.description: Number of records that failed in a batch or multi-record integration.

skippedCount.description: Number of records skipped in a batch or multi-record integration.

dataUrl.description: URL of the data used in the integration.
